items.line_en: I'd like to see a doctor.

coach.say: I'd like to see a doctor.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I'd like to see a doctor.

items.line_en: Do I do this, yo?

coach.say: Do I do this, yo?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Do I do this, / yo?

items.line_en: No problem.

coach.say: No problem.
coach.hint: Chunk it: No problem.

items.line_en: Ima madhe go bioli minkorada kotua arimaska.

coach.say: Ima madhe go bioli minkorada kotua arimaska.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Ima madhe go bioli minkorada kotua arimaska.

items.line_en: Have you been to our clinic before?

coach.say: Have you been to our clinic before?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Have you been to our clinic before?

items.line_en: Kon kai naj me to this.

coach.say: Kon kai naj me to this.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Kon kai naj me to this.

items.line_en: No, this is my first time.

coach.say: No, this is my first time.
coach.hint: Chunk it: No, / this is my first time.

items.line_en: So, diska?

coach.say: So, diska?
coach.hint: Chunk it: So, / diska?

items.line_en: Do you want to do this?

coach.say: Do you want to do this?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Do you want to do this?

items.line_en: Okay, what seems to be the problem today?

coach.say: Okay, what seems to be the problem today?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Okay, / what seems to be the problem today?

items.line_en: Do you want to do this?

coach.say: Do you want to do this?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Do you want to do this?

items.line_en: I've been having some issue with my throat.

coach.say: I've been having some issue with my throat.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I've been having some issue with my throat.

items.line_en: So, diska?

coach.say: So, diska?
coach.hint: Chunk it: So, / diska?

items.line_en: How can you do this?

coach.say: How can you do this?
coach.hint: Chunk it: How can you do this?

items.line_en: Okay, anything else?

coach.say: Okay, anything else?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Okay, / anything else?

items.line_en: Do you want to do this?

coach.say: Do you want to do this?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Do you want to do this?

items.line_en: I have a little fever.

coach.say: I have a little fever.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I have a little fever.

items.line_en: Do you want to do this?

coach.say: Do you want to do this?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Do you want to do this?

items.line_en: Can you show me your health insurance card before consultation?

coach.say: Can you show me your health insurance card before consultation?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Can you show me your health insurance card before consultation?

items.line_en: Here is the insurance card.

coach.say: Here is the insurance card.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Here is the insurance card.

items.line_en: Do you have a letter of reference?

coach.say: Do you have a letter of reference?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Do you have a letter of reference?

items.line_en: No, there is no referral letter.

coach.say: No, there is no referral letter.
coach.hint: Chunk it: No, / there is no referral letter.

items.line_en: I understand.

coach.say: I understand.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I understand.

items.line_en: Please go to the Department of Internal Medicine.

coach.say: Please go to the Department of Internal Medicine.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Please go to the Department of Internal Medicine.

items.line_en: Since this is your first consultation, please fill out this questionnaire with your name,

coach.say: Since this is your first consultation, please fill out this questionnaire with your name,
coach.hint: Chunk it: Since this is your first consultation, / please fill out this questionnaire with your name,

items.line_en: address medical condition and past medical history.

coach.say: address medical condition and past medical history.
coach.hint: Chunk it: address medical condition and / past medical history.

items.line_en: Please describe here a little more about your current condition.

coach.say: Please describe here a little more about your current condition.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Please describe here a little more about your current condition.

items.line_en: Okay.

coach.say: Okay.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Okay.

items.line_en: Isu kamae karashojunga hajimatemas nakto kunikakabat yoi diska?

coach.say: Isu kamae karashojunga hajimatemas nakto kunikakabat yoi diska?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Isu kamae karashojunga hajimatemas nakto kunikakabat yoi diska?

items.line_en: My symptom has been started one week ago.

coach.say: My symptom has been started one week ago.
coach.hint: Chunk it: My symptom has been started one week ago.

items.line_en: Where can I fill it in?

coach.say: Where can I fill it in?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Where can I fill it in?

items.line_en: Isu kamae dot okachkara site?

coach.say: Isu kamae dot okachkara site?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Isu kamae dot okachkara site?

items.line_en: Okay, you can just write one week ago here.

coach.say: Okay, you can just write one week ago here.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Okay, / you can just write one week ago here.

items.line_en: All done.

coach.say: All done.
coach.hint: Chunk it: All done.

items.line_en: Arigato bazaimasu.

coach.say: Arigato bazaimasu.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Arigato bazaimasu.

items.line_en: Thank you.

coach.say: Thank you.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Thank you.

items.line_en: This is your patient registration card.

coach.say: This is your patient registration card.
coach.hint: Chunk it: This is your patient registration card.

items.line_en: Please bring this forum next time.

coach.say: Please bring this forum next time.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Please bring this forum next time.

items.line_en: Please wait in your seat.

coach.say: Please wait in your seat.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Please wait in your seat.

items.line_en: I will call you.

coach.say: I will call you.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I will call you.
